model_id: claude-opus-4-8 (1M context, max effort, per Ruling #5)
harness: Claude Code v2.1.211 in a Beckon terminal pane
notes: REVISED on re-review from 9 to 10 (wow 1→2), judged in a real browser alongside Kimi's re-review. WebGL lamp with molten wax that heats, rises, deforms and merges; the model verified its own render headlessly at t=4s and t=60s before declaring done. 20m 47s at max effort; cost_usd is the API-equivalent output cost (180.8k tokens at $25/1M, OpenRouter) — the run itself was on a flat-rate subscription.
